calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-26-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
Petitioner, Veronica Romero, was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the minors Juan Pablo Torres, Ivonne Athziri Martinez and Aldo Roman Martinez.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to: Juan Pablo Romero, Ivonne Athziri Romero and Aldo Roman Romero.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-04-2007 Off Calendar
